channel.title: Vim on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Vim on Margrop Blog

item.title: Vim opens the file with Chinese garbled characters
item.description: Solution Edit the ~/.vimrc file (create it manually if it doesn’t exist) and add the following lines set fileencodings=utf-8,ucs-bom,gb18030,gbk,gb2312,cp936 set termencoding=utf-8 set encoding=utf-8
